question: Which revenue stream contributes the most to total revenue in the last quarter shown?

options.A: The purple area (Service fees) indicates the highest share.
options.B: Cannot determine which revenue stream contributes the most without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.C: The orange area represents the dominant revenue stream.
options.D: The red area corresponds to the largest revenue stream.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
